text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of computer science that helps machines understand human language. Instead of just reading words, NLP allows computers to interpret the meaning behind text. This technology powers many everyday tools. For example, online translation services use NLP to convert text from one language to another. Sentiment analysis is another application, where companies analyze customer reviews to understand if the feedback is positive or negative. Finally, chatbots rely heavily on NLP to hold conversations with users, answering questions in a natural way. In short, NLP bridges the gap between human communication and computer understanding.
